title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She carried on singing even after the music stopped.
example.secondSentence: She (1) _________ even after the music stopped.

questions.firstSentence: Someone invented the telephone in the 1870s.
It was such a surprising result that no one expected it.
questions.secondSentence: The result was (1) _________ that no one expected it.

questions.firstSentence: You can stay here if you behave well.
She was too shy to ask for help.
questions.secondSentence: She wasn't (1) _________ to ask for help.

questions.firstSentence: He said, 'I will call you tomorrow.'
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ call me the next day.

questions.firstSentence: I have never been on a cruise before.
questions.secondSentence: This would be (1) _________ I go on a cruise.
